notes: debug-502 is non-discriminating: both configs pass all assertions. Debugging is general knowledge.
Skill's core value is the multi-account token config pattern — novel and not in baseline.
Baseline defaults to browser login for account management, exactly what user wants to avoid.
Token cost overhead is modest (30%) for a substantial quality gain on account management tasks.
